payment_id.description: Must be a UUID. The unique identifier of the payment.

policy_id.description: Must be a UUID. The unique identified of the policy the payment is linked to.

payment_method_id.description: Must be a UUID. The unique identifier of the payment method used to make the payment.

amount.description: The payment amount as an integer in cents.

external_ref.description: Unique external reference of the payment.

created_at.description: The time at which the payment was created.

created_by.description: An object indicating the user or API key that created the policyholder.

updated_at.description: Date the payment was last updated.

billing_date.description: The customer's chosen payment date, as specified using the `billing_day` property on the policy.

payment_date.description: The target date for the payment to go off the customer’s card or bank account. Typically the same as `billing_date`, but may be earlier or later if `billing_date` falls on a bank holiday or Sunday.

action_date.description: The date that the system first attempts to collect the payment from the customer's card or bank account. Typically the same as the `payment_date`, but can be earlier for certain payment methods.

app_data.description: `null` is allowed. An object containing additional custom data for the payment.

currency.description: Three-digit currency code for the payment. E.g. `ZAR` or `GBP`

retry_of.description: Must be a UUID. Only relevant for retry payments. Original payment id of the payment being retried.

retry_number.description: `null` is allowed. Only relevant for retry payments. The number of times the payment has been retried (including the current retry payment).

net_amount.description: Integer in cents. The payment amount net of any charges.

finalized_at.description: The date the payment update was finalized.

finalized_by.description: `null` is allowed. An object indicating the user or API key that finalized the payment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the actor e.g. user

policyholder.description: `null` is allowed. The policyholder linked to the payment.

policy.description: `null` is allowed. The policy the payment is linked to.

charges.description: Whenever a premium payment is created (including reversals), a breakdown of the payment amount is calculated according to the charges stored on the policy.

amount.description: The charged amount. Required when type is `fixed` or `variable`. Either a proportion of the total premium (if `type` is `variable`), or a currency amount in cents (if `type` is `fixed`).

raw_response.description: The raw response from upstream providers.
